Politics.headline: Commerce Secretary Lutnick testifies on Epstein ties
Politics.detail: Commerce Secretary Lutnick testified regarding his connections to Jeffrey Epstein.

Politics.headline: Tennessee congressional map proposal sparks protests
Politics.detail: A proposed congressional map in Tennessee is facing backlash and triggering protests.

Politics.headline: What are US proposals to end war, and will Iran agree to them?
Politics.detail: Iran is currently reviewing a proposal from the U.S. aimed at ending the ongoing conflict between the U.S., Israel, and Iran, which has led to a global crisis.

Politics.headline: FBI raids Virginia Senate Leader Louise Lucas' office
Politics.detail: The FBI has conducted a raid on the office of Virginia Senate Leader Louise Lucas.

Politics.headline: Trump pardon recipients face congressional probe over "pay-to-play" questions
Politics.detail: Individuals who received pardons from former President Trump are now facing a congressional investigation due to concerns about potential "pay-to-play" schemes.

Finance & Economy.headline: Private sector added 109,000 jobs in April, above expectations, ADP says
Finance & Economy.detail: The private sector in the US added 109,000 jobs in April, exceeding expectations, according to the ADP National Employment Report. This indicates a continued, though potentially slowing, recovery in the labor market.

Finance & Economy.headline: Gas prices surge past $4.50 nationally as Iran tensions pressure drivers
Finance & Economy.detail: Rising tensions with Iran have contributed to a surge in gas prices across the US, surpassing $4.50 per gallon nationally. The conflict raises concerns about potential disruptions to oil supply routes.

Finance & Economy.headline: UK construction firms face some of sharpest cost rises in nearly 30 years
Finance & Economy.detail: UK construction firms are experiencing some of the most significant cost increases in almost three decades. This is putting pressure on building projects and potentially impacting housing affordability.

Finance & Economy.headline: US Job Cuts Rise to 3-Month High
Finance & Economy.detail: US-based employers announced 83,387 job cuts in April 2026, the most in three months, compared to 60,620 in March, but down 21% from the same month last year. Artificial Intelligence led all reasons for job cuts for the second month in a row, with 26% of total cuts.

Finance & Economy.headline: Mexico's Inflation Rate Slows in April as Expected
Finance & Economy.detail: Mexico's annual inflation rate eased to 4.45% in April 2026 from 4.59% in March, which was the steepest since August 2024. Figures came marginally below analysts' forecasts of 4.50%.

Technology.headline: Samsung says its Galaxy Watch can predict fainting with 'high accuracy'
Technology.detail: The feature would allow users to get into a safe position or call for help, potentially providing a significant health benefit for users at risk of fainting.

Technology.headline: Xbox is ditching Microsoft's Copilot AI
Technology.detail: The AI assistant is no longer coming to consoles and will be removed from the Xbox mobile app, signaling a shift in strategy for the gaming brand.

Technology.headline: ChatGPT's new default model is more factual and better at personalization
Technology.detail: OpenAI is deploying GPT-5.5 Instant to all users starting today, promising improvements to coding and more accurate responses.

Technology.headline: Google Closes Project Mariner, Web Browsing AI Shut Down Earlier This Week
Technology.detail: Google has shut down Project Mariner, its web browsing AI, earlier this week, marking an end to the project.

Technology.headline: Your Xbox Won't Get Microsoft Copilot AI Features After All
Technology.detail: Xbox's new CEO has confirmed Copilot doesn't 'align with where' the gaming brand is heading, meaning Microsoft's AI assistant will not be integrated into the console.

Science.headline: Next-generation obesity drug works like a Trojan horse
Science.detail: Researchers have created a next-generation obesity drug that uses GLP-1/GIP signals to slip a powerful metabolic enhancer directly into target cells, outperforming existing treatments in mice by curbing appetite and boosting energy expenditure.

Science.headline: Aging doesn't just add fat—it redistributes it in risky ways
Science.detail: Scientists found that testosterone plays a key role in the shift of fat distribution to the abdomen, which can harm health, in older women recovering from hip fractures.

Science.headline: Some Signs of Depression May Show Up in Blood, Study Finds
Science.detail: A recent study indicates that certain signs of depression can be identified in blood samples, potentially leading to new diagnostic and treatment approaches.

Science.headline: New Study Links Coffee Intake to Microbiome Changes and Improved Mental Well-Being
Science.detail: A new study has found a link between coffee intake and changes in the gut microbiome, which are associated with improved mental well-being.

Science.headline: Neandertals used rhinoceros teeth as tools
Science.detail: A recent archaeological study revealed that Neandertals utilized rhinoceros teeth as tools, providing insights into their tool-making practices and resourcefulness.

Health.headline: New “Trojan Horse” Obesity Drug Supercharges Weight Loss in Early Tests
Health.detail: Researchers have created a next-generation obesity drug that works like a “Trojan horse,” using GLP-1/GIP signals to slip a powerful metabolic enhancer directly into target cells, outperforming existing treatments in mice.

Health.headline: Scientists Discover Why Ozempic Works Better for Some People
Health.detail: A year-long study in Japan found that people taking Ozempic-like diabetes drugs may be getting dramatically better results depending on why they overeat in the first place.

Health.headline: Scientists Find a Way to Stop Dangerous Belly Fat as We Age
Health.detail: Scientists found that testosterone plays a key role in the redistribution of fat to the abdomen as we age, where it can harm health; the study focused on older women recovering from hip fractures.

Health.headline: Contact tracing underway for dozens who got off cruise ship amid hantavirus outbreak
Health.detail: Countries worldwide scrambled on Thursday to trace people who had left the cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak before it was anchored off the coast of Cape Verde.

Health.headline: Finerenone Benefits Patients With T2D and CKD No Matter What
Health.detail: Finerenone, a nonsteroidal mineralocorticoid receptor antagonist, provides kidney and cardiovascular benefits for patients with type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease, regardless of baseline risk.

Sports.headline: Nearly 130 arrests around Paris amid celebrations for PSG reaching Champions League final
Sports.detail: Celebrations in Paris following PSG's advancement to the Champions League final led to nearly 130 arrests.

Sports.headline: Semien and Soto homer, leading the surging Mets 10-5 over the Rockies
Sports.detail: Semien and Soto hit home runs, contributing to the Mets' 10-5 victory over the Rockies.

Sports.headline: Thousands at funeral for Italian auto champ and Paralympic gold medalist Alex Zanardi
Sports.detail: A large crowd attended the funeral of Alex Zanardi, the Italian auto racing champion and Paralympic gold medalist.

Sports.headline: Trump shows renderings for UFC White House event: 'Greatest show on earth'
Sports.detail: Former President Trump presented renderings for a potential UFC event at the White House, calling it the 'greatest show on earth'.

Sports.headline: IPL 2026 final moved from Bengaluru to Ahmedabad
Sports.detail: The final of the IPL 2026 has been moved from Bengaluru to Ahmedabad, according to recent reports.

Entertainment.headline: Ted Turner Dies: CNN Founder Dead at 87
Entertainment.detail: CNN founder and media mogul Ted Turner has died at the age of 87. He revolutionized the news industry and leaves behind a significant legacy.

Entertainment.headline: Kustom Entertainment hires Rosen Group for media push
Entertainment.detail: Kustom Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ: KUST) has engaged Rosen Group to expand media visibility as the company accelerates its transformation into a focused live entertainment platform. The engagement supports media relations, executive visibility, thought leadership and strategic messaging as Kustom scales its live event production, ticketing ecosystem, and readies the 30th Country Stampede festival June 25–27, 2026.

Entertainment.headline: Madison Square Garden Entertainment Corp. Reports Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results
Entertainment.detail: Madison Square Garden Entertainment Corp. reported a 2% increase in revenue for the fiscal third quarter ended March 31, 2026, with revenue reaching $246.3 million. The increase was driven by a growth in the number of concerts at Madison Square Garden Arena.

Entertainment.headline: LeAnn Rimes Addresses ‘RHOBH’ Casting Rumors After Brandi Glanville Shade
Entertainment.detail: LeAnn Rimes has responded to rumors that she may be joining the cast of 'The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills' after Brandi Glanville made some remarks. Rimes' potential casting has generated buzz among fans of the reality TV show.

Entertainment.headline: MotoGP™ full gas on ServusTV until 2030
Entertainment.detail: ServusTV, the Salzburg-based broadcaster, will remain the exclusive Austrian TV partner of MotoGP until 2030, including rights for MotoGP™, Moto2 and Moto3. The deal ensures Austrian fans will continue to receive high-quality coverage of the motorcycle racing series.

Crime & Justice.headline: Brazil femicides hit new high despite tougher laws
Crime & Justice.detail: Brazil registered 399 femicides in the first quarter of 2026, the highest number for the period since the country began tracking the crime 11 years ago, with an average of four women killed each day. The figures, which come from the Justice and Public Security Ministry's database, represent a 7.5% increase from the same period in 2025.

Crime & Justice.headline: Former FedEx driver sentenced to death for killing Texas girl, 7
Crime & Justice.detail: Tanner Horner, a former FedEx driver, was sentenced to death after pleading guilty to the 2022 capital murder of a 7-year-old girl he abducted from her home while delivering a Christmas gift in Texas. Jurors in a Fort Worth courtroom decided on Horner's punishment after hearing testimony and evidence, including audio of the victim's last moments.

Crime & Justice.headline: New York judge releases purported Epstein suicide note
Crime & Justice.detail: A U.S. federal judge released a document described as a suicide note purportedly written by Jeffrey Epstein, which included the line: “It is a treat to be able to choose one's time to say goodbye”. The handwritten note was said to have been found by his former jail cellmate, convicted murderer and ex-police officer Nicholas Tartaglione.

Crime & Justice.headline: Justice Department Announces Results of Operation Iron Pursuit
Crime & Justice.detail: The Justice Department announced the results of Operation Iron Pursuit, a one-month, nationwide enforcement effort that located more than 200 child victims and led to the arrests of over 350 child sex abuse offenders. The operation, which involved all 56 FBI field offices and U.S. Attorneys' offices, commenced April 1 and ended April 30.
Crime & Justice.source: Western District of Michigan | Justice Department

Crime & Justice.headline: Justice Department launches civil rights probe into prosecutor in Virginia
Crime & Justice.detail: The Justice Department has launched a civil rights investigation into Fairfax County Commonwealth's Attorney Steve Descano following complaints that his office is too lenient with criminal defendants who are in the country illegally. The investigation follows years of criticism from conservatives regarding Descano's handling of cases.

Education.headline: Further education workforce in England
Education.detail: Official statistics announcement regarding the further education workforce in England has been released.

Education.headline: College and local authority accountability statements
Education.detail: Guidance has been issued regarding college and local authority accountability statements.

Education.headline: Children accommodated in secure children's homes, England and Wales: 31 March 2026
Education.detail: National statistics announcement concerning children accommodated in secure children's homes in England and Wales.

Education.headline: Illinois lawmakers question progress under Evidence-Based Funding for public education
Education.detail: Lawmakers in Illinois are assessing the progress made under the Evidence-Based Funding formula for public schools, with some expressing skepticism despite increased spending.

Education.headline: 2026 World Digital Education Conference to be held in Hangzhou
Education.detail: China's Ministry of Education announced the 2026 World Digital Education Conference will be held in Hangzhou, featuring a Global Youth Artificial Intelligence Study Camp.

Lifestyle.headline: Dr Sriram Nene's tips to 'beat the heat before it beats you' this summer
Lifestyle.detail: Dr. Sriram Nene shares advice on how to stay healthy and manage the summer heat.

Lifestyle.headline: 'It's a tiny bit of joy!' How trinket swapping is making the world a happier place, one china sheep at a time
Lifestyle.detail: People are finding happiness through swapping trinkets and small items.

Lifestyle.headline: Retro haven in Singapore: A retired couple's treasure-filled home
Lifestyle.detail: A retired couple in Singapore has created a retro-themed home filled with treasures.

Lifestyle.headline: How 'exercise snacking' can slash risk of diseases in a few minutes
Lifestyle.detail: Brief bursts of exercise throughout the day can significantly reduce the risk of various diseases.

Lifestyle.headline: Malaika Arora Shuts Down Cosmetic Surgery Rumours: "Don't Need That Right Now"
Lifestyle.detail: Malaika Arora denies rumors of cosmetic surgery, stating she doesn't need it at the moment.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Editorial: End game in Iran emerging
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The Trump Administration is undertaking a new strategy in its war in Iran, claiming to be close to a deal with Iran's leadership as the cost of gas rises and a U.S.-led task force attempts to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Endorsement: Oakland businesses need all the help they can get. Yes on Measure C
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The San Francisco Chronicle's editorial board recommends a 'yes' vote on Oakland's Measure C, which aims to provide temporary tax relief to small businesses, especially minority-owned and family-run enterprises, to help them survive economic challenges. The measure is seen as an important gesture to improve the relationship between the city and its businesses.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Tardy justice
Opinion/Editorial.detail: An editorial discusses a case from September 2017, where then Overall Deputy Ombudsman Arthur Carandang reported obtaining bank transaction records related to an investigation into a plunder complaint against then President Rodrigo Duterte and his family.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Preparing people to prevent fraud
Opinion/Editorial.detail: An editorial discusses the persistent challenge of fraud in Taiwan, highlighting a case where a repeat offender was rearrested for a fake investment scheme. It emphasizes that despite stricter punishments, public education remains crucial to equip people with the knowledge to recognize and avoid fraud.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Beloved mothers, with or without 'I love you'
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Oanh Ngo Usadi reflects on navigating filial piety as a child in Vietnam and as a parent in America.

World.headline: Chad declares national mourning after deadly Boko Haram ambush
World.detail: Chad has declared national mourning after a deadly Boko Haram ambush, highlighting the ongoing security challenges in the region.

World.headline: French warship moves towards Hormuz for possible defensive mission
World.detail: Amidst ongoing tensions, a French warship is moving towards the Strait of Hormuz for a potential defensive mission, adding to the international military presence in the area.

World.headline: Argentina races to find origins of cruise ship hantavirus outbreak, amid reports some passengers have returned to US
World.detail: Argentinian authorities are working to determine the source of a hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship, with some passengers having already returned to the United States.

World.headline: At least 26 dead, 61 injured in Chinese fireworks factory explosion
World.detail: A fireworks factory explosion in China has resulted in at least 26 fatalities and 61 injuries, prompting investigations into the cause of the accident.

World.headline: Iran war day 69: Tehran 'reviewing' US proposals; Israel bombs Beirut
World.detail: As the conflict continues, Iran is reportedly reviewing proposals from the United States while Israel has conducted bombings in Beirut.

Zimbabwe.headline: Chivayo denies marriage to Sonja Madzikanda in urgent court bid, challenges asset claims
Zimbabwe.detail: Wicknell Chivayo is urgently challenging claims regarding his assets and denying his marriage to Sonja Madzikanda in court.

Zimbabwe.headline: Death toll rises to 17 in Harare–Nyamapanda crash involving Malawi-bound coach
Zimbabwe.detail: A tragic accident on the Harare-Nyamapanda road involving a coach headed to Malawi has resulted in 17 fatalities.

Zimbabwe.headline: Government declares Monavale wetland 'no-go area' after residents' protest
Zimbabwe.detail: Following protests by residents, the government has declared the Monavale wetland a protected area, prohibiting further development.

Zimbabwe.headline: “You conned farmers before with currency changes” – MPs grill Mangudya as farmers' US$6 million diverted to banks to save COTTCO assets
Zimbabwe.detail: Parliamentarians have accused former RBZ governor Mangudya of deceiving farmers in the past with currency changes, as US$6 million meant for farmers was redirected to banks to rescue COTTCO assets.

Zimbabwe.headline: EU supports Zimbabwe's minerals value addition but says policy surprises problematic
Zimbabwe.detail: The European Union is in favor of Zimbabwe adding value to its minerals but notes that unexpected policy changes are creating challenges.
